variants.notes: Confirmed 2026-05-11 from the design notes (`MIMX9352xxxxM.mex`).  Full order-code suffix (package + temperature + qualification) still pending the user-supplied exact HW config writeup -- the `xxxx` placeholder reflects that.

notes: Orderable variant resolved to **i.MX 9352** (2026-05-11) per the design-doc inventory; the full order-code suffix (package code + temperature grade + qualification) is still pending the HW-config writeup.  i.MX 9352 is the top-of-line i.MX 93 SKU: dual A55 @ 1.7 GHz + M33 @ 250 MHz + Ethos-U65, no GPU.
Per-peripheral counts (`peripherals: {}`) intentionally still empty -- ingestion against IMX93RM.pdf has not yet run.  The RM is 5593 pages so this is a separate dedicated pass.
i.MX 93 has *no GPU* -- that's a deliberate split with i.MX 95.  Display path is LCDIF + MIPI DSI (no 2D GPU acceleration).

Companion silicon on the ALP Lab E1M-i.MX93 SoM (per the vendor datasheet): NXP PCA9451A PMIC; Murata Type 2DL / 2EL / 2KL / 2LL Wi-Fi 6 + BLE 5.x combo (variant TBD); IW610 Wi-Fi 6 module -- confirm which combo ships on which SKU when the user writes the exact HW config.

Reference docs available locally: IMX93HDG.pdf (Hardware Design Guide, 42 p), IMX93RM.pdf (Reference Manual Rev. 6, 5593 p), AN14413.pdf (PCA9451A PMIC application note).  All cross-referenced in the `datasheet.source` field above.
